title: microseris insignis
intro: Microseris insignis, also known as the desert gold or silver puffs, is a small, annual or perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microseris insignis include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds and skin conditions, and exhibit antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Microseris insignis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin issues and internally to support overall health.
